zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Umfreville於大約1192年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale30歲，母親Margaret de Balliol26歲。他於大約1212年與Mrs. Eva De Umfreville在英國諾圖波藍德比爾特利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1244年3月13日在英國諾圖波藍德普盧多享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Umfreville was born about 1192, in Northumberland, England, his father, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, was 30 and his mother, Margaret de Balliol, was 26. He married Mrs. Eva De Umfreville about 1212, in Birtley, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 13 March 1244, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Umfreville est né environ 1192, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Balliol, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Eva De Umfreville environ 1212, à Birtley, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1244, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Umfreville(이)가 대략 1192년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Balliol(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1212년 영국 노르스벌랜드 비르틀리에서 Mrs. Eva De Umfreville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1244년 3월 13일 영국 노르스벌랜드 플루드호에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Mrs. Eva De Umfreville aproximadamente 1212, em Birtley, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Umfreville родился около 1192 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Balliol, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Eva De Umfreville около 1212 г. в местности биртли, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 13 марта 1244 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.
